THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPECK CAB CO C/O L/O SIDNEY R. SHERAY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CASCIATO, PETER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUL-28-2004, GRANTED
CROSS-COMPLAINT IS A DUMMY FILING FOR THE PURPOSE OF RENDERING JUDGMENT IN SMALL CLAIMS, ON CROSS- COMPLAINT AGAINST SPECK CAB CO.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPECK CAB CO C/O L/O SIDNEY R. SHERAY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASCIATO, PETER $1,402.30 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,402.30, NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CASCIATO, PETER AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT SPECK CAB CO C/O L/O SIDNEY R. SHERAY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-28-2004 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
